name: AOC Organizing Team
subject: New York must move off dirty fossil fuels
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
A major energy company is trying to build a dangerous gas-fired power plant in our district.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210317-1947-header&t=1&akid=1947%2E2526796%2EJsqhLo)
A major energy company is trying to build a dangerous gas-fired power plant in Alexandria’s district.
The proposed Astoria waterfront project would replace a 50-year-old oil-burning turbine with a fracked gas power plant – maintaining our reliance on fossil fuels while further degrading air quality in neighborhoods already ridden with toxic fossil fuel power plants and elevated levels of asthma.
Alexandria and eight of her fellow New York City congressional Democrats sent a letter calling on Gov. Cuomo’s administration to stop the project, but we need to do more.1
**The best way to stop the fossil fuel lobby and pass a Green New Deal is to talk to voters, and get undecided people on our side. It’s how we win and it’s why we’re asking you today:**
[Will you sign up for a phone banking shift to help educate NY-14 voters about this project and the Green New Deal? Every call helps build our movement for climate justice.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/7944?utm_source=em20210317-1947&t=2&akid=1947%2E2526796%2EJsqhLo)
_We’re in special need of bilingual Spanish/English speakers to phone bank. If you or someone you know is able to phone bank in Spanish, it would help ensure we reach everyone in NY-14._
[Green New Deal Deep Canvass Phone Bank](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/7944?utm_source=em20210317-1947&t=3&akid=1947%2E2526796%2EJsqhLo)
Saturday, March 20 at 1:00PM ET**[Get more info or RSVP](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/7944?utm_source=em20210317-1947&t=4&akid=1947%2E2526796%2EJsqhLo)** [Green New Deal Deep Canvass Phone Bank](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/7944?utm_source=em20210317-1947&t=5&akid=1947%2E2526796%2EJsqhLo)
Saturday, March 27 at 1:00PM ET**[Get more info or RSVP](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/7944?utm_source=em20210317-1947&t=6&akid=1947%2E2526796%2EJsqhLo)** _Two-hour training session followed by one-hour of phone banking_ [See other available shifts.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/7944?utm_source=em20210317-1947&t=7&akid=1947%2E2526796%2EJsqhLo)
---
We’re up against powerful interests. NRG Energy has spent over $600,000 on some of New York’s most powerful lobbying firms to get this project approved.
That’s why it will take hundreds of volunteers stepping up to counter their attacks and win from the grassroots.
**New York must move off dirty fossil fuels.** By law, New York must generate 70% of its electricity from renewable sources, like solar and wind power, by 2030 and 100% from carbon-free sources by 2040.
In order to meet these targets, this site must be converted to renewable energy immediately – such as a renewable energy storage battery hub or other green energy production facility.
[We must act now to avoid further climate disaster. Join us for a Saturday shift to talk one-on-one with NY-14 voters about the importance of the Green New Deal.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/7944?utm_source=em20210317-1947&t=8&akid=1947%2E2526796%2EJsqhLo)
Thank you for all you do,
Team AOC
1 - [Queens Daily Eagle](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8219?t=9&akid=1947%2E2526796%2EJsqhLo)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20210317-1947-footer&t=10&refcode2=1947_2526796_JsqhLo&akid=1947%2E2526796%2EJsqhLo)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=11&akid=1947%2E2526796%2EJsqhLo) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=12&akid=1947%2E2526796%2EJsqhLo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=13&akid=1947%2E2526796%2EJsqhLo)
Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you'd like to update your contact information, **[click here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=14&akid=1947%2E2526796%2EJsqhLo)**. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=1947%2E2526796%2EJsqhLo). To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
Email us: us@ocasiocortez.com

subject: Register for An Evening of Women’s Empowerment & Thanks to our Volunteers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Amanda Edwards

[ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001c4jEJXKqnf_d7qOfy86jwX-kogW-tlnTaIUyxfziolpLmvVDSARLuSg7e_18JoHQgqrdPJuSZWIBfzcwM5Dj-fxNqRejnTRzN5lN1yF3HtUUZlsqC050CJ4DRc-9z0_ue-5PAUHB-GA4hpAWMUkisQ==&c=IDYTvOlKEzZ1ojFdvaaIxhuU69M0hRz9q4zy61KGeN2Ewxclvvzx7w==&ch=r_1iEIJTVHeHQcrFaWYC8HWy-6wsxbv_A7RhE6zvx5ATdj4AF2IM6g==)

---
| March 2021 Update
---
| |
---
| | |
---
Friends, As you are aware, Texas was hit hard by the winter storms and the lack of energy preparedness, leaving many of our most vulnerable communities like our low-income senior citizens still struggling. Our volunteers were able to assist with multiple phone banking events to assist seniors. In response to the widespread need of so many seniors, Be The Solution: Community Empowerment Organization partnered with Ismaili Council for the Southwesterm US, I-Cerve and Altruistic Endeavors NGO to host the Home-Bound Senior Food & Water Drop to deliver food, water and resources to the doorsteps of seniors in light of the pandemic. Thank you to the overwhelming support of our volunteers!

Check out this video footage from the event:
---
[ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001c4jEJXKqnf_d7qOfy86jwX-kogW-tlnTaIUyxfziolpLmvVDSARLuR_QAcloFXtQCR1Qcvuvjdjg6Wd2zGUn1qphG_Q6hGW91DtxTcqSH-R-0zH0griq5JvsAQ1zkkdVJsvIJ9Mqmottd5c1XepYb7LztoxHSFH76HSax0YQvog0XxcwVMF4sw==&c=IDYTvOlKEzZ1ojFdvaaIxhuU69M0hRz9q4zy61KGeN2Ewxclvvzx7w==&ch=r_1iEIJTVHeHQcrFaWYC8HWy-6wsxbv_A7RhE6zvx5ATdj4AF2IM6g==)

|
---
UPCOMING EVENTS
---
Be The Solution: Community Empowerment Organization will host An Evening of Women's Empowerment: The 2021 Women's Renaissance on Tuesday, March 30th at 6pm in honor of Women's History Month.
This free event, which is in partnership with the Greater Houston Women's Chamber of Commerce, WatchHerWork, Women's Business Enterprise Alliance, Women's Masters Network, and SocialMama, will be an unforgettable evening of panel discussions and empowering talks from inspirational women including: Mayor Annise Parker (President & CEO, Victory Fund), A'shanti Gholar (President, Emerge America), Emily Cain (Executive Director of Emily's List), Mikaila Ulmer (Founder, Me & the Bees Lemonade), Shauna Clark (Global & US Chair of Norton Rose Fulbright US LLP), Suzan Deison (CEO & Founder of the Greater Houston Women's Chamber of Commerce), Denise Hamilton (CEO & Founder of WatchHerWork), Amanda Ducach (Co-founder, SocialMama), Pastor Juanita Rasmus (Author & Co-Pastor of St. John's Church), and Royce Brooks (Executive Director, Annie's List), Candace Valenzuela (Former Candidate for Texas Congressional District 24), Hami Arrington (President, Women's Masters Network), April Day (President, Women's Business Enterprise Alliance), Mary Grace Landrum (Former Spring Branch ISD Trustee), and Terri B. Williams (Author, Find Your Fire).
---
[ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001c4jEJXKqnf_d7qOfy86jwX-kogW-tlnTaIUyxfziolpLmvVDSARLuR_QAcloFXtQBey_Ytqn6kNuSmtAH4LUlsYXxkLgubnavC_b9TJnuEecQGxfiMd0H97bJyAydaYZ2hORK3kqQJ7Oe1QX7pspiglRwaaviisVi4enTD1cy-YjeN0NjFOJqPf5_Z_ES2kLdWLcCiqZdjaZ-nw608K6TSE4oe-51qqBocWHdzGJWJi3z5ao6-Y8Ft_4Bs8MN44iL6xaEa-rtDhT16EMP1dvkg==&c=IDYTvOlKEzZ1ojFdvaaIxhuU69M0hRz9q4zy61KGeN2Ewxclvvzx7w==&ch=r_1iEIJTVHeHQcrFaWYC8HWy-6wsxbv_A7RhE6zvx5ATdj4AF2IM6g==)

CHECK OUT THE NEXT EPISODE OF THE EDWARDS EMPOWERMENT TALKS PODCAST! In response to the need to inspire and empower people during these challenging times, I launched my podcast, The Edwards Empowerment Talks! Through this platform, I invite inspiring guests to tell their personal stories of perseverance and defying the odds to encourage my listeners and viewers to stay focused and dig deep in order to do the same in their own lives. I also invite guests whose community work will equip listeners and viewers with the tools to impact change in their own community, as well. Please make sure to SUBSCRIBE TODAY to The Edwards Empowerment Talks podcast using this link: [https://linktr.ee/amandakedwards](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001c4jEJXKqnf_d7qOfy86jwX-kogW-tlnTaIUyxfziolpLmvVDSARLuSg7e_18JoHQ8Yl1CfvKFaCHUBZlj0rJTcgxN7vjdJAZZMbEcIsk9j60Rhs_4n1x7rCvMtKeCyYPcfkKtTs3C5agMh7mTCk3NcjeyAHlHmsV&c=IDYTvOlKEzZ1ojFdvaaIxhuU69M0hRz9q4zy61KGeN2Ewxclvvzx7w==&ch=r_1iEIJTVHeHQcrFaWYC8HWy-6wsxbv_A7RhE6zvx5ATdj4AF2IM6g==). Trust me - You don't want to miss these inspirational and empowering conversations! Our recent episodes include:

* Rhonesha Byng, Founder & CEO, Her Agenda

---
[ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001c4jEJXKqnf_d7qOfy86jwX-kogW-tlnTaIUyxfziolpLmvVDSARLuR_QAcloFXtQFVMpuZYljfJdtJDCOPsorliN9FZwiFH1J1CbhIAYFAhFx24S7GCJEfIjZ89KDQniO012yNRyLs2eTBgQ6wP9rEL3cFxYbQUAM1OWMGwMOSdpBBfDWzhlqtyEsr0rw_rj&c=IDYTvOlKEzZ1ojFdvaaIxhuU69M0hRz9q4zy61KGeN2Ewxclvvzx7w==&ch=r_1iEIJTVHeHQcrFaWYC8HWy-6wsxbv_A7RhE6zvx5ATdj4AF2IM6g==)
---
In Episode 13 of The Edwards Empowerment Talks podcast, Amanda Edwards has an intriguing conversation with Rhonesha Byng, Founder & CEO of Her Agenda, a digital media platform that elevates millennial women by bridging the gap between ambition and achievement. In elevating other women, she has blazed a trail that has propelled her to speak at places like the White House and be recognized on lists like Forbes' 30 Under 30. In this interview, Rhonesha shares advice she has used that enabled her to continue to persevere and achieve her dreams. Rhonesha is honest, encouraging and grounded, which makes this episode one that you do not want to miss!

* Pastor Juanita Rasmus, author & Co-pastor, St. John's Church

---
[ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001c4jEJXKqnf_d7qOfy86jwX-kogW-tlnTaIUyxfziolpLmvVDSARLuR_QAcloFXtQUEkRz2FOydWvp04IJmSHi7cYbABhzGAWzaQCwfY35rl8mIpxBabOChPvsD-zzZQZBqAH0UunZSV5AkP2PI-0lPyrj2kOoIHQzVvmLGv4rFb6vgmrP0ewMmVSQkfccOPl&c=IDYTvOlKEzZ1ojFdvaaIxhuU69M0hRz9q4zy61KGeN2Ewxclvvzx7w==&ch=r_1iEIJTVHeHQcrFaWYC8HWy-6wsxbv_A7RhE6zvx5ATdj4AF2IM6g==)
---
In Episode 11 of The Edwards Empowerment Talks podcast, Amanda Edwards has a soul-touching and raw conversation with Pastor Juanita Rasmus, an author, speaker and pastor. Pastor Juanita Rasmus seemingly had it all - a loving family, a great church congregation, strong faith and a supportive community until her depressive episode she describes as her "crash" changed the treadmill course of her life. In her recent book, Learning To Be, Pastor Juanita uses her personal testimony to help people take better care of themselves and how to learn to be human beings rather than just humans doing. Pastor Juanita is open, honest and heartfelt in desire to use her personal testimony and lessons learned to benefit those who are living life in the fast lane. This is one Episode you do not want to miss!

* Jonathan Sprinkles, Motivational Speaker

---
[ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001c4jEJXKqnf_d7qOfy86jwX-kogW-tlnTaIUyxfziolpLmvVDSARLuR_QAcloFXtQvnU8zlClSZM0nWH5JroxRPoDp1G23_ky5VCvMme153hoHAqdNPgJ_uXPUUQ1PuH4q1QM_TxMkjwvD-2lKVz-U6lXhQ7rU9joQf-kOMzyZuhOixNnKQjuCBxySLeETKlo&c=IDYTvOlKEzZ1ojFdvaaIxhuU69M0hRz9q4zy61KGeN2Ewxclvvzx7w==&ch=r_1iEIJTVHeHQcrFaWYC8HWy-6wsxbv_A7RhE6zvx5ATdj4AF2IM6g==)
---
In Episode 12 of The Edwards Empowerment Talks podcast, Amanda Edwards has an engaging conversation with Jonathan Sprinkles, an author and motivational speaker. He has channeled his own challenges into creating messages that uplift and encourage others to bet on themselves. Jonathan grew up in California, and lost his father as a teenager. After his father's passing, Jonathan and his mother moved to Austin, Texas. With a nagging sense that he did not fit in, he knew that something big was in store for his life. After becoming a student leader at the University of Texas, he began to focus on public speaking. He eventually took a job at a large company, and realized he needed to take the leap and bet on himself to become a full time professional public speaker. Jonathan has published many books, hosted numerous conferences, and coached numerous professionals. During this episode, he described the challenges of 2020, and how he has had to pivot and create new entrepreneurial opportunities. Check out this episode!

Our next episode features:

* Denise Hamilton, Founder & CEO, WatchHerWork

subject: Join Us Today! A Briefing on the American Rescue Plan
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Progressive partners and fellow Democrats, Help is here! Just 50 days since taking office, President Biden and Democrats have secured a major and consequential victory: successfully passing the American Rescue Plan, a bold and historic legislative package that will provide much-needed relief to millions of working people across the country. Please join us on [Today from 4:00pm-4:30pm ET for a briefing on how you can help us spread the word about the American Rescue Act. Register for this important briefing by clicking here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=cf596678b2&e=d6c5c7d7ec). Because of Democrats, working families bearing the brunt of this crisis will see $1,400 direct checks in the mail, thousands more in individual benefits, funding to get more Americans vaccinated, the resources to get our kids and teachers safely back to school, access to more affordable health care and so much more. This is a huge accomplishment, but we still have so much work to do to help our country recover from this pandemic. One thing is clear: we have to keep electing Democrats up and down the ballot to get critical, progressive legislation like the American Rescue Plan across the finish line. When we elect Democrats, working people have more opportunity and better support. Our fundamental rights are restored and protected. But we have to make sure that voters know how we delivered for them when it counted most, and how Republicans did not, when they next head to the ballot box. That’s where you come in! Without you, these victories aren’t possible. To win elections in 2021, 2022 and beyond, we need trusted voices like yours to spread the word now about this incredible victory and what it means for people across the country. This is our time to help our friends and neighbors understand how the ARP benefits them, and what Democrats are able to deliver with their support. [Please join us Today at 4:00pm ET for this important briefing](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=5fdb6831f4&e=d6c5c7d7ec)

Thank you,
Mansoor Khadir
Senior Advisor - DNC Political Department
Twitter: @MansoorKhadir

body:
We have to do something about the crisis at our southern border.
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kWR_F67tpHNR1FOQc-tFyNJ8s0FvvBiTXtBK5sJ8WphcLut0MTTboBBHsv49slYXCHN9kPCO2KBBUxM7IKdDuI0JsvzOirLjoSmkmgt1aJEqWWkKRbxW9rLjlr-0Fv0FkwDT940brYXXq2gXncfTBrgRGSafzCAFzlE0aXqt0OopTmWZC_7luzcwNfKYC_KdSIXRc4fjtpKtHAtUENHq8Us067zD-LrcSK6VeHMcQtRZjXo0cu5TfW8hwL6u0CviBZSofVXjt7BNwwZvP1yHKbeGvrvLr0Rvm2x08Ko_UYJoidwpPeN52LgOgRV83rnJwo3OStXvhjCkXf90x7G-Ris23wjyk00rEmkE962EL2rIXUKAIjuocaC8uuY7T-7b&c=NP_MCYiI0wSnlPy7M5t5B1i69EJ0TgY2jVQzGm5P8oKIhOlR_Z8j7g==&ch=Nqke6-Or9zfVuytyEILqwl8u3qaJz78KRsx4Mr0LyL9vBjonSntMPw==)
Friend,

**We have to do something about the crisis at our southern border.**

Not only do we have a humanitarian crisis on our hands, _we 're also seeing a growing threat to our national security. _

Since Joe Biden took office, attempted border crossings have spiked to the highest rate our country has EVER seen, [_**and if we don 't do something NOW, things will only get worse.**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kWR_F67tpHNR1FOQc-tFyNJ8s0FvvBiTXtBK5sJ8WphcLut0MTTboBBHsv49slYXCHN9kPCO2KBBUxM7IKdDuI0JsvzOirLjoSmkmgt1aJEqWWkKRbxW9rLjlr-0Fv0FkwDT940brYXXq2gXncfTBrgRGSafzCAFzlE0aXqt0OopTmWZC_7luzcwNfKYC_KdSIXRc4fjtpKtHAtUENHq8Us067zD-LrcSK6VeHMcQtRZjXo0cu5TfW8hwL6u0CviBZSofVXjt7BNwwZvP1yHKbeGvrvLr0Rvm2x08Ko_UYJoidwpPeN52LgOgRV83rnJwo3OStXvhjCkXf90x7G-Ris23wjyk00rEmkE962EL2rIXUKAIjuocaC8uuY7T-7b&c=NP_MCYiI0wSnlPy7M5t5B1i69EJ0TgY2jVQzGm5P8oKIhOlR_Z8j7g==&ch=Nqke6-Or9zfVuytyEILqwl8u3qaJz78KRsx4Mr0LyL9vBjonSntMPw==)
**We MUST take action against Biden 's DANGEROUS open border policy.
[ _Join me TODAY in taking a stand against the Left 's reckless immigration agenda._](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kWR_F67tpHNR1FOQc-tFyNJ8s0FvvBiTXtBK5sJ8WphcLut0MTTboBBHsv49slYXCHN9kPCO2KBBUxM7IKdDuI0JsvzOirLjoSmkmgt1aJEqWWkKRbxW9rLjlr-0Fv0FkwDT940brYXXq2gXncfTBrgRGSafzCAFzlE0aXqt0OopTmWZC_7luzcwNfKYC_KdSIXRc4fjtpKtHAtUENHq8Us067zD-LrcSK6VeHMcQtRZjXo0cu5TfW8hwL6u0CviBZSofVXjt7BNwwZvP1yHKbeGvrvLr0Rvm2x08Ko_UYJoidwpPeN52LgOgRV83rnJwo3OStXvhjCkXf90x7G-Ris23wjyk00rEmkE962EL2rIXUKAIjuocaC8uuY7T-7b&c=NP_MCYiI0wSnlPy7M5t5B1i69EJ0TgY2jVQzGm5P8oKIhOlR_Z8j7g==&ch=Nqke6-Or9zfVuytyEILqwl8u3qaJz78KRsx4Mr0LyL9vBjonSntMPw==)**

body:
|

name: Matt Gaetz (Personal)
subject: The GOP needs to be America-First!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013DWowOIkKZ7F2t5GJLsj-x-Kftc_FdHivLPiiGR9mLprNe9_Zx0w90zONQERiPhcAtRCed6RFq6j9jpf9DZ1ezW9iX13T5T9EXPmAWq_AXFfAfch8Sk-Ip1Gt3IqhPHQuIOxuW0xCCsBsHMs1MKryGGsnwb5ZNiBwvMY3ULvbxSsTWtJZNtyJYP07pq49z7w&c=88Ri0xXVsnY-VOPCzB_XrES5xMtEkQ_WkzUAjkvmKcGH1I7uTyFJgQ==&ch=r6p_yk7i1aT_Lf_3tqOh_MbNGLjbEqzuoYj1iIXf-04UVgJcPeJlCA==)
---
| Peter,
Donald Trump has called for America-First Republicans to run for Congress so we can truly see a government that represents the people. Right now, we have leadership that favors globalists and corporate interests instead of standing up for the Silent Majority.
Americans want warriors that fight the fake news media, put America first, and that will fight corrupt corporations that use American ingenuity to develop their products here and then turn around and ship their job to China.
The era of the swamp and war machine is over, and Republicans need to act on it.
[We need to shed all establishment RINOs from the conservative wing of government. Each voter should ask their candidates or elected officials:](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013DWowOIkKZ7F2t5GJLsj-x-Kftc_FdHivLPiiGR9mLprNe9_Zx0w90zONQERiPhcAtRCed6RFq6j9jpf9DZ1ezW9iX13T5T9EXPmAWq_AXFfAfch8Sk-Ip1Gt3IqhPHQuIOxuW0xCCsBsHMs1MKryGGsnwb5ZNiBwvMY3ULvbxSsTWtJZNtyJYP07pq49z7w&c=88Ri0xXVsnY-VOPCzB_XrES5xMtEkQ_WkzUAjkvmKcGH1I7uTyFJgQ==&ch=r6p_yk7i1aT_Lf_3tqOh_MbNGLjbEqzuoYj1iIXf-04UVgJcPeJlCA==)
\- Do you support President Trump's America First policies?
\- Are you willing to stand up for the middle class and bring back our jobs from China?
\- Do you believe in free speech or do you support Silicon Valley's unconstitutional quest to censor conservatives?
\- Are you willing to take on the Deep State that is targeting Trump supporters?
\- Do you believe that All Lives Matter - including the unborn - or are you going to cower to Liberal Mob?
If your candidate or elected official says yes to all of these questions, you can trust The Swamp won't consume them once they are in office.
Conservatives like you and me need to vote out every RINO.
[Please, consider donating to my campaign to be your warrior in D.C. I will always put America First, but The Swamp hates me...that is why I need your support.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013DWowOIkKZ7F2t5GJLsj-x-Kftc_FdHivLPiiGR9mLprNe9_Zx0w90zONQERiPhcAtRCed6RFq6j9jpf9DZ1ezW9iX13T5T9EXPmAWq_AXFfAfch8Sk-Ip1Gt3IqhPHQuIOxuW0xCCsBsHMs1MKryGGsnwb5ZNiBwvMY3ULvbxSsTWtJZNtyJYP07pq49z7w&c=88Ri0xXVsnY-VOPCzB_XrES5xMtEkQ_WkzUAjkvmKcGH1I7uTyFJgQ==&ch=r6p_yk7i1aT_Lf_3tqOh_MbNGLjbEqzuoYj1iIXf-04UVgJcPeJlCA==)

name: VA Progressive Update (via Team Samirah)
subject: What CNN is saying about the 2021 elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Samirah for Delegate
body:
Just this week CNN published an article detailing how critical the 2021 off-year elections in Virginia will serve as a “proving ground for both parties” and we couldn’t agree more. It’s not hyperbole to say the nation will be watching closely as Virginia selects its leaders for the new generation, and if Democrats aren’t ambitious and proactive we risk handing control of the Commonwealth back to Republicans.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/26423001/276910390/-1001649105?refcode=210318_cnn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDk5Y2U0Mi0xYzg4LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ISX3Agb-8T1hy8g2wX9IxKoJADr8XnEQQoTB0lHWhWU=) Derek, Just this week CNN published an article detailing how critical the 2021 off-year elections in Virginia will serve as a “proving ground for both parties” and we couldn’t agree more. It’s not hyperbole to say the nation will be watching closely as Virginia selects its leaders for the new generation, and**if Democrats aren’t ambitious and proactive we risk handing control of the Commonwealth back to Republicans.** Frankly, Progressives like Delegate Ibraheem Samirah have been hard at work building momentum around ambitious policy goals that will lift ALL Virginians up -- but the GOP establishment are doing everything in their power to stop it. Luckily, we know that these bold, progressive policies are popular with the voters and will help Democrats win up and down the ballot in 2021. But in order to get our message out, we need your help. Ibraheem talks often about the importance of “building the next Virginian decade” and if we want to lay the foundation for a decade full of progress, transparency, and accountability then we NEED to help bold, progressives win.
Our team is hard at work, and we thank you so much for the support you’ve given so far. **But we can’t take our foot off the gas pedal now.**
Let’s keep up the momentum,
Team Samirah

clean_body: Just this week CNN published an article detailing how critical the 2021 off-year elections in Virginia will serve as a “proving ground for both parties” and we couldn’t agree more. It’s not hyperbole to say the nation will be watching closely as Virginia selects its leaders for the new generation, and if Democrats aren’t ambitious and proactive we risk handing control of the Commonwealth back to Republicans. = Derek, Just this week CNN published an article detailing how critical the 2021 off-year elections in Virginia will serve as a “proving ground for both parties” and we couldn’t agree more. It’s not hyperbole to say the nation will be watching closely as Virginia selects its leaders for the new generation, andif Democrats aren’t ambitious and proactive we risk handing control of the Commonwealth back to Republicans. Frankly, Progressives like Delegate Ibraheem Samirah have been hard at work building momentum around ambitious policy goals that will lift ALL Virginians up -- but the GOP establishment are doing everything in their power to stop it. Luckily, we know that these bold, progressive policies are popular with the voters and will help Democrats win up and down the ballot in 2021. But in order to get our message out, we need your help. = | | = | = | = | = Ibraheem talks often about the importance of “building the next Virginian decade” and if we want to lay the foundation for a decade full of progress, transparency, and accountability then we NEED to help bold, progressives win. Our team is hard at work, and we thank you so much for the support you’ve given so far. But we can’t take our foot off the gas pedal now. name: Tim Scott
subject: My response to the media and woke mob
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
As an African-American conservative Republican, I am no stranger to the constant attacks and harassment from the liberals and their media allies. After all, the liberals can't stand my story. They can't stand the fact that someone like me, whose family went from picking cotton to serving in Congress in one lifetime, is a PROUD conservative.
Friend,

As an African-American conservative Republican, I am no stranger to the constant attacks and harassment from the liberals and their media allies.

After all, the liberals can't stand my story. They can't stand the fact that someone like me, whose family went from picking cotton to serving in Congress in one lifetime, is a **PROUD conservative.**
[STOP THE WOKE MOB](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/stop-the-woke-mob/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210318_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1052589-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210318_my-response-to-the-media-and-woke-mob)
---

Now, the liberal media is stirring up the woke mob in an attempt to score political brownie points with the Democrats and discourage minorities from being Republicans.

[**Friend, will you stand with me against the hate of the woke mob and chip in $100, $25, $10, or anything you can to support me?**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/stop-the-woke-mob/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210318_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1052589-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210318_my-response-to-the-media-and-woke-mob)

Liberal media personalities like Joy Reid and Don Lemon are all for diversity until Black people and other people of color start thinking differently than them. They attack me on television with little thought for the political extremism their words inspire among the woke mob.

I have a message for all the liberal haters and the woke mob: **You won 't silence me.**

I am proud of my journey and I am honored to fight for our God-given rights in the U.S. Senate. [**%%First Name%%, if you are able, please chip in to stand with me against the woke mob.**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/stop-the-woke-mob/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210318_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1052589-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210318_my-response-to-the-media-and-woke-mob)

name: Josh Hawley
subject: PROOF: The Obama/Biden Administration Cowered to Big-Tech
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
How did big tech get so big? Washington gave away the store. [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=e92150ca0b9e4ee0b5140bf94be14097&_e=SIBErLczhibsErFsUCHiA2eMluHS0mMRQPn8j9d02-vi2-BMhX-Z0yklRCu0Esk12QmiSE3WqzZ-jH3Tq6NfdsdM9t64dvx2pO6gwu9ZSTMUudmU_uTZxLwmbzU-HSVxfBz56qdig8dBfcgbWKUZedz8JFchd1y9yrbo5elmCTDxwtwV6isrVEouF00trU03jD5Feaw-BVnJIGsakzwL59BOcNGPCPpvtp5VWSFQ3uzavmxoyGAKqmV-AC5l1eJtdKFveP_aOEXcuSYxuODc7yUA0IdOdu6JKDjwU_iF31ZOI91Gh7_K5S1gu2O6SFYzn2B8TwE691OZLiaLiRsXStveHxBsf3F36OcfmEbFres%3D) | |
---
Peter,
We are fighting an uphill battle — a battle for America.

We face a powerful alliance, of Big Tech oligarchs in Silicon Valley advancing the agenda of liberals in Washington while being vigorously defended by the mainstream media.

**How did big tech get so big? Washington gave away the store.**

These tech giants didn’t gain this outsized influence overnight, they got **MAJOR HELP** from the Obama/Biden Administration.

Recent reports have revealed that nearly a decade ago, FTC regulators appointed by Obama found **CLEAR EVIDENCE** that Google engaged in predatory tactics to further cement their stranglehold on online search results and online advertising.

Yet the **OBAMA/BIDEN ADMINISTRATION DID NOTHING** , much to the detriment of competition or fair markets.

Fast forward to today, and these tech behemoths work together to coordinate and cultivate their censorship of conservatives.

It is well known that Google has buried stories that could damage democrats, and that the social media giants like Facebook and Twitter have censored the reach of conservative voices and viewpoints.

This must END!

We must **BREAK UP BIG-TECH** , and give regular people their **VOICE BACK**.

Will you join with me?
[_**DONATE HERE**_](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=e92150ca0b9e4ee0b5140bf94be14097&_e=SIBErLczhibsErFsUCHiA8zCPMMV09DhK-j-d4-Dw4OIjeLushVhNxR2YVOYUI309DEcLtPpgDrGg2BOEY_PindXDT0ZBvaBpGdwIF09afqm9XFkLSWSlri0SPfsVU8agxiDJkbUlk1r9GcXDElQyGXOY56fepnrCrwut4E7p2OEHUSq9BRxhyIOQoZSLhvvC2f11xOhSAuSFkLUNOV0XYsHVk0xAhRAW0vnvkXC6LqnKsdy6KTT-oZjfniXkZRw6EisS6nv-Gi194SJ5cUz30MpgzJeJ1kYtpAyUujbqURdEFKhNOWSLzJ0L5yZXN9tZQ9xcuQRsAJ6lQI2HKhXzjDMLInfcVDHdpCh0me87T9tqIL8kaxEQ7ZsdNCLfTfwrv6dCDnPjNqiPUgaCcmH0g%3D%3D)

Thank you,
Josh Hawley

|

name: Biden Border Crisis (via House Republicans)
subject: It’s hard to ignore the obvious facts:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:

body:
| | | _We know you are a strong Democrat who supports historic campaigns. So we want to hear from you..._ **Do you think it’s time to make history and elect the first Black woman to serve as governor nationwide?**
[YES](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yjZLPSju4XTeYGijEDvYSsQXBZSXnoKPd9gi_D9NfFGvu4h9nh_oJvWNBPCOM-Pv1RR-9NjqCQjzE9k61l53q7zGDK0f5YQ32wQu9Zmng2h-lZ6FGjJYSDp6hpRuKlhIo_sINBAdJyJPF19ZnGdG-F9Slpk7769y5enNV60my_I8mDkOHN16HjMFenEEp0igwpikXt2F7LbOHiNZ8VsrVYypGyjsFUgwQrLYTkpcpG97P7qjxI5zJwixyrhntA9apJENoweY-TD4RiQljOZ13REvOdhs0L1I7_C9N8nxR-vmcWbNY6XxBRsBL-9x2TzrppDO_OZMidyfe1RASqHDk7OmMwUMSsjCM-Kolw1SiNow/3ab/-AMJQI5ESx-FU1VdXkgRKw/h0/BzMB_q0wllHwpBzlDZ2aYjpXEuzbqI-ZIkrsA23fSRw)

Jennifer Carroll Foy is running to do just that! Her whole life, people have told her “no.”

No, you won’t make it out of Petersburg, VA.

No, you can’t graduate from the Virginia Military Institute -- _but after the Supreme Court’s landmark decision to open its doors to women, she did and she was one of the FIRST women to do so._

No, you can’t win -- _but when she ran for Delegate she not only won, she FLIPPED a Republican district in the process._

**Every time, she proved doubters wrong. And based on polling, she has the momentum to do it again running to be the FIRST Black woman to serve as governor nationwide.**

**She’s here to serve and she’s here to win but she can only do it with you by her side.[Donate now.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y_7DmAt5nfMM7QFvx_QNiBS9XPu4bRQaFrPFZ-zhYUtS4z0kHUy8nQJ4H_gSEo8c0NOuqFYTmZ8aPXrs3jFrRI87AOYv9k7pELKnkADPDwHaKSoumLLXQhaN5rvQQkXblfVDegVGvfSbebXhiaQ0lHZdpWkZTxkPchVLgojhy0BcVxA35lJV1IGHbTUDgIyTtCuli8e_RYAg-IJ_riHwb5i3W6zmdaZV1LC1EAjhGUYq26HIZGru6BntMHVGtmTE0QWJkUfITnX1Zg7phze9-WeSYf6QnXOO0RiREOzLk4q4XfL0aXqTW0fj0eNzKpdvfk8kPtk1RllfYdrAcVOSlFv3TfguLITvrmu5gXo7u0uA/3ab/-AMJQI5ESx-FU1VdXkgRKw/h2/ZIq3wWvPypfaHSVgYbipuEDQz1KncGqaBbuYSzaqalo)**

* * *
_Jennifer Carroll Foy was born and raised in Petersburg. In 2017, she flipped a Republican district as a first-time candidate pregnant with twins. During her time as Delegate, Jennifer championed the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment, helped expand Medicaid to 400,000 Virginians, and advocated for the Commonwealth’s most vulnerable communities.

She has a career of public service and it started long before 2017. As a public defender, Jennifer helped give a voice to the often voiceless — children, people suffering from addiction, those experiencing homelessness, those with mental illness, and the poor.

Now she’s running to be the first woman elected Governor of Virginia and serve as the first Black woman to be governor nationwide. **[Help her make history. name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Return of earmarks – take action today to stop them!
body:
| |
---
**[Tell your Representative to sign the pledge to STOP the Currency of Corruption!](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDc3LWQ3MTM4YTgxZTQxMTQ5NTVhYzdlM2Q5NjIwNjhhNzBk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvc3RvcC10aGUtY3VycmVuY3ktb2YtY29ycnVwdGlvbi8_bWlkPTQzNTEzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=cbwdzRq5hSCjhweobLyzVQ)**
|
---
Did you know that a majority of the House Republican Conference voted recently to allow Republican members of the House of Representatives to request earmarks again?

For ten years, Republicans stood against earmarks, but that is no longer the case.

And, of course, Democrats never oppose earmarks because nothing makes them happier than spending your money. In fact, they are trying to call them “community project funding” to hide the fact that they are bringing back earmarks.

We have a really easy way for you to take action and urge your Representative to oppose bringing back earmarks. But first, what is an earmark?
_The term earmark spending refers to a part of a spending bill that allocates money for a specific thing such as a location, project or institution. The key difference between an earmark and a general budget line is the specificity of the recipient, which is usually a particular project in a specific Congressman's district or a Senator's home state. Earmarking is often used as a tool for negotiation and deal-making: a representative might vote in favor of a project in another representative's district in exchange for earmarked funding in his own district.[1](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDc3LWQ3MTM4YTgxZTQxMTQ5NTVhYzdlM2Q5NjIwNjhhNzBk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3AX2Z0bnJlZjE%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGhvdWdodGNvLmNvbS90aGUtZGVmaW5pdGlvbi1vZi1hbi1lYXJtYXJrLTMzNjgwNzY_bWlkPTQzNTEzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=PrdqmKuwvbQpvla0C0ZFRw)_

**More simply, earmarks are federal funds controlled by leadership and used by members of congress to fund pet projects, which in turn, fuel corruption and spending growth.**

Simplest: earmarks are the currency of corruption.

After all of the spending Congress has done “because of Covid,” the last thing America needs is another, easier way to spend more of our money.

We created a **[Stop the Currency of Corruption Pledge](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDc3LWQ3MTM4YTgxZTQxMTQ5NTVhYzdlM2Q5NjIwNjhhNzBk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvc3RvcC10aGUtY3VycmVuY3ktb2YtY29ycnVwdGlvbi8_bWlkPTQzNTEzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=ys99RbToy8gQyINDDKN8IA)** for members of Congress to sign. We will track who signs it and who doesn’t, and make sure their constituents know if they have taken the pledge.

So, what can you do?

**[Sign on to our letter urging your member of Congress to sign the pledge.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDc3LWQ3MTM4YTgxZTQxMTQ5NTVhYzdlM2Q5NjIwNjhhNzBk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvc3RvcC10aGUtY3VycmVuY3ktb2YtY29ycnVwdGlvbi8_bWlkPTQzNTEzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=jgKcAMmAubgAYst90uzYtg)**

Please help us put the pressure on Congress to stop this currency of corruption before it’s too late.

In liberty,

Jenny Beth Martin
[CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDc3LWQ3MTM4YTgxZTQxMTQ5NTVhYzdlM2Q5NjIwNjhhNzBk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZG9uYXRlLz9taWQ9NDM1MTMmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=xw4XcT-R3tC7TlxaOzeBVw)
|
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDc3LWQ3MTM4YTgxZTQxMTQ5NTVhYzdlM2Q5NjIwNjhhNzBk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvP21pZD00MzUxMyZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=wfuyb0HH8_BkLLnyEa-L3w)

name: Breaking Updates via NVAF
subject: Horrible news.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Victory Action Fund
body:
The March mid-month deadline was the last check in before the end of the first quarter. And we came up short.

_We MISSED our benchmark. _

The March mid-month deadline was the last check in before the end of the first quarter. And we came up short.

This is horrible news for conservatives across the country who are in a race to catch up to the Democrat Machine's massive fundraising advantage.

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: Really exciting news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
For every dollar we’re spending, we are raising $1.62 for AOC.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210318-1949-header&t=1&akid=1949%2E2526796%2EioY_q1)
Hi Team!
After the 2020 election, Facebook banned political figures from running fundraising advertisements — a move that was incredibly detrimental to campaigns like ours that depend on grassroots donors.
**We lost a major fundraising stream for _over four months_ , but now we have some really exciting news.** They’re back and we’re trying to make up for the ground we lost.
**For every dollar we’re spending, we are raising $1.62 for AOC.[Can you chip in $10 today so we can invest these funds and turn your donation into $16.20?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8233?refcode=em20210318-1949&t=20&akid=1949%2E2526796%2EioY_q1)**
Your donations help us build our movement. They allow us to do deep canvassing around the Green New Deal, they support our Homework Helpers tutoring program, and they help us raise funds for mutual aid and food distribution efforts.
Just this week we put up some brand new ads (you may have even seen one or two!) to see how much we could raise... and the results so far are astonishing:
Spent | $98,078.04
---|---
Raised | $159,176.40
**Return on Investment** | **162%**
**[Contribute $10 now »](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8233?refcode=em20210318-1949&t=21&akid=1949%2E2526796%2EioY_q1)**
We know campaigns ask for money all the time. But, it’s not every day that we can confidently say your $10 donation could turn into $16 for AOC and recruit a new person to join this movement.
That’s a huge opportunity, and the truth is we don’t know how long this Facebook ad surge is going to continue, so we need to strike now.
[**Please, if you can afford it, chip in $10 to help us raise another $16.20 and recruit more people on to Team AOC. Every dollar right now is getting multiplied 1.62x for the campaign!**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8233?refcode=em20210318-1949&t=22&akid=1949%2E2526796%2EioY_q1)
Thank you for all you do,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20210318-1949-footer&t=23&refcode2=1949_2526796_ioY_q1&akid=1949%2E2526796%2EioY_q1)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=1949%2E2526796%2EioY_q1) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=1949%2E2526796%2EioY_q1) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=1949%2E2526796%2EioY_q1)
Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you'd like to update your contact information, **[click here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=27&akid=1949%2E2526796%2EioY_q1)**. It has never been more important for Republicans to win back majorities in the House and Senate in 2022 to prevent a permanent Far Left takeover.
There are many great and talented conservative leaders in Georgia considering a bid to run for Senate this cycle.
Georgia needs a voice for everyone who will represent conservative values and fight back against the Democrats' disastrous policies.
****[HELP ME STOP THE FAR LEFT](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZxioHJgKyLNloMrEydPZoFdovPzZ3esUzbB_c7tmpE0S2vn4r-kQsBZKmaj9-uSHWqBaTCRLk78FZPOvbWQNqaFlwAmzVAhipG-1NLHa9kKGKJ8LL8NNKKVbWyB-P9kiOsXZiOH_Bbdo-adu4ywgq-9UxeSp_JRQYWF-SG_ylzec-H4Bn7NcaljSqoNUcQjF7XiAI7jHnbcVCKMxZOtVvwPZ6XPcUm9TDRl9qUKvJBs6BTrYJw7-KZXAM9yyXv3HexufXislmUmX7tcwe47nXsxJlq3X910aV51Fv0om9UnXBdqB8y-QsPcOnzvf9UMbhLeWGi6X1TFLSzmIwJwjibg0CPloDwPj4cX3u_XGIy-zQxuwmHxuVbSj-Sv1tC_cF2gm7VNXt_vQzb6T_YA7lkXhG3opF-PTcK5nHcz1O3fIkxsjxbjzBly1BC21nyK2R6T50BrKBAkWI2m6F7iG-Q==&c=KyyzgH0iNkMvmwKL8EPo-ZIgVEIi1-8mF_k4XEhdeFVo7jiODoyf0g==&ch=buzvqjhJaH2BNXqK36KFomcVj7RLfUlTgyZ3Kmc6FA9hNxbOX7PC9w==)****

**I 'm dedicated to defending liberty and will fight for the people of Georgia first and foremost. I'll always be a check on the Far Left's radical agenda. **
****[HELP ME STOP THE FAR LEFT](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZxioHJgKyLNloMrEydPZoFdovPzZ3esUzbB_c7tmpE0S2vn4r-kQsBZKmaj9-uSHWqBaTCRLk78FZPOvbWQNqaFlwAmzVAhipG-1NLHa9kKGKJ8LL8NNKKVbWyB-P9kiOsXZiOH_Bbdo-adu4ywgq-9UxeSp_JRQYWF-SG_ylzec-H4Bn7NcaljSqoNUcQjF7XiAI7jHnbcVCKMxZOtVvwPZ6XPcUm9TDRl9qUKvJBs6BTrYJw7-KZXAM9yyXv3HexufXislmUmX7tcwe47nXsxJlq3X910aV51Fv0om9UnXBdqB8y-QsPcOnzvf9UMbhLeWGi6X1TFLSzmIwJwjibg0CPloDwPj4cX3u_XGIy-zQxuwmHxuVbSj-Sv1tC_cF2gm7VNXt_vQzb6T_YA7lkXhG3opF-PTcK5nHcz1O3fIkxsjxbjzBly1BC21nyK2R6T50BrKBAkWI2m6F7iG-Q==&c=KyyzgH0iNkMvmwKL8EPo-ZIgVEIi1-8mF_k4XEhdeFVo7jiODoyf0g==&ch=buzvqjhJaH2BNXqK36KFomcVj7RLfUlTgyZ3Kmc6FA9hNxbOX7PC9w==)****

subject: Juan was wrong – President Trump will go down as one of the greats
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/737007e5e3a74b04/79341921c307de01c3d6b838967d376c/34143) Peter, You may have seen an article from Juan Williams earlier this week that said President Donald Trump would go down in history as one of the worst presidents in America. He couldn’t be more wrong – which is why I penned a response. [My article in The Hill](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/737007e5e3a74b04/b1d408f2dfa69e67c3d6b838967d376c/34143) refutes Juan’s mischaracterization of Trump’s presidency, highlighting the reasons I believe Trump will be remembered as one of the greatest presidents of all time. Here’s some of what I wrote: _Like many Americans, when I look back on the Trump presidency, I see four years of unprecedented achievement. I see fearless leadership from a man who wasn’t chasing the favorability of the media and didn’t care what his opponents thought of him. I see a president who fought for America and stood against socialist policies, critics be damned._ _President Trump was faced with an unprecedented crisis last year when COVID-19 began to shut down the country, put millions of Americans out of work, and caused a crisis in our health care system. He leapt into action, appointing the second-highest-ranking person in our government to lead the Coronavirus Task Force._ _Operation Warp Speed is a once-in-a-lifetime accomplishment that I strongly believe could not have happened under any president but Donald Trump. There is nothing to compare it to in history, that’s how important and impactful it is — not only for Americans, but for the entire world. Any successes the Biden administration is experiencing on the vaccine front are a direct result of President Trump and Operation Warp Speed._ [You can read my whole article here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/737007e5e3a74b04/ea6a5e17b16e363ec3d6b838967d376c/34143). I’m fighting back against the radical left, against progressives led by Biden and Pelosi who are hell-bent on destroying everything President Trump accomplished for Americans over the last four years. **It’s up to us to protect and preserve President Trump’s legacy. It’s our job to ensure the America First agenda lives on – which is why it’s so important for conservatives to take back the House in 2022**. **[Will you help me?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/737007e5e3a74b04/09674c3d74accf8bc3d6b838967d376c/34143)** This is our time to show the world that conservatives will not be silenced and cannot be canceled. [Donate now!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/737007e5e3a74b04/2d29514f842202fcc3d6b838967d376c/34143) Thank you so much for your continued support, I could not do this without you! Sincerely, Kevin Hern | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/737007e5e3a74b04/b10ac6c0f63d3758c3d6b838967d376c/34143) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/737007e5e3a74b04/8d229b91fb53060cc3d6b838967d376c/34143)

President Trump was faced with an unprecedented crisis last year when COVID-19 began to shut down the country, put millions of Americans out of work, and caused a crisis in our health care system. He leapt into action, appointing the second-highest-ranking person in our government to lead the Coronavirus Task Force. Operation Warp Speed is a once-in-a-lifetime accomplishment that I strongly believe could not have happened under any president but Donald Trump. There is nothing to compare it to in history, that’s how important and impactful it is — not only for Americans, but for the entire world. Any successes the Biden administration is experiencing on the vaccine front are a direct result of President Trump and Operation Warp Speed. . I’m fighting back against the radical left, against progressives led by Biden and Pelosi who are hell-bent on destroying everything President Trump accomplished for Americans over the last four years. Republicans only need to flip ONE Senate seat to win back the majority, and Senator Maggie Hassan is a top target. Back to back polls show her DOWN, but our campaign fundraising has fallen off a cliff.

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. You can learn more about us at [rslc.gop](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OHMvhpR2VYuIrjdqyqy9a0qyncr_wd_gjkcI0J7D7RVlnZ4n3wQqWfFdPByOfw2Z8I8cx-0yZrBIEeNbVZ4QCdCFBXeqHXeA7nI3BW-klHZCjQ-HRi_f3Dkv2Y7mhkO33K2zwC3Fxr0=&c=VTgeTqv-TzesabLZyZ_CyV4_gaL2BF0Xlm3pBQutCqxN9EaLCSwmHw==&ch=nkW57tvfHB5y4LL4O7jnMLmwRAnEALahjI1L4p143-0GHn3ow6GwJw==).

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. You can learn more about us at [rslc.gop](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014fOrAu2orXQ8bXHCVVLptT1vtR-_ldRc43pE-l1bNu04ulv9hzIzn9mYTBDoWw-K5kCA-_HNFL60UXtH0tFrkLj4Uj0pFyro-0pYNhmt59iqx2ByNXU0GUfi7abFpUOLwQQLLqoBvTY=&c=5lXgQFZ-w5wvJaIpLjKLRybpk8XOZRFLEujDz_8FZCQwXGgWAUUluQ==&ch=sYpQZ8bhhf2PrKKefKiHdiBxTL87AcQE5w434hsWuu63ur0gouDG8Q==).

We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. body:
The Radical Left Reaches an All-Time Low...

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001thCyOlw-97cnHZTwVzJw5TvBC7OGRSRLH7tbOOblQE-xOxZIbX99yU-5KSFk-zpcvwLKdWSaD__taIIO3YMr60QAfM2ShYl_Dr4fk40zpib6G5XYnRIGvjVhf5VbqpuqWEUKdXM3Hfv-KkBq59laBJ11qg0vSLmlHKC5enIQcDWZIdJovGdj2kcOw4ZH9gX1G7DpxjSw13Zg2RTaUQTh00k-DOMZSKb82B8-TofAB8bfQpmI_aH7BmHdTQr5Ih-bA2hgjdnZSJapdwX4i6EDnJGTMw5XHi7WM4tr7IreCrErIbTy3HvdfaKVzxjrkSc6pQChhDgA1OQz7cFXjJ-9uI72cdWJXVac9X5J7pzqLFr2DXIYD83ddOrEnIRnst8_CAcSiRdpvrgqnht4H_Y2S3aYV5JtZ7TRVEDWhFXVVpG8UtiBeyQAZw==&c=1AbIww3J_sRL9nM07rIQainAjM_jZujFCgog4kcbjto_iVPIWH192g==&ch=cwl7OambJEaZJPNAcMFx9Enk9BaXrh5K8p6mMApdHV1IMFe-oZthow==)
Friend,
Jeff drew a line in the sand this week after a member of our local media left a DEATH THREAT on his home phone and then threatened his family.
At the same time, Jeff blasted the Ocean City Sentinel for publishing columns, before and after, in which this same columnist suggests the Congressman should be executed for treason, vividly describes invading and destroying his home, and graphically ponders sexually assaulting Jeff's wife and recording her reaction.
_**This is truly unbelievable. We know what the Radical Left does, but this goes way too far.**_ We must take a stand against these threats--and we hope you will stand with us.
[**Will you join us in condemning these horrible threats against Congressman Van Drew and his family?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001thCyOlw-97cnHZTwVzJw5TvBC7OGRSRLH7tbOOblQE-xOxZIbX99yU-5KSFk-zpcvwLKdWSaD__taIIO3YMr60QAfM2ShYl_Dr4fk40zpib6G5XYnRIGvjVhf5VbqpuqWEUKdXM3Hfv-KkBq59laBJ11qg0vSLmlHKC5enIQcDWZIdJovGdj2kcOw4ZH9gX1G7DpxjSw13Zg2RTaUQTh00k-DOMZSKb82B8-TofAB8bfQpmI_aH7BmHdTQr5Ih-bA2hgjdnZSJapdwX4i6EDnJGTMw5XHi7WM4tr7IreCrErIbTy3HvdfaKVzxjrkSc6pQChhDgA1OQz7cFXjJ-9uI72cdWJXVac9X5J7pzqLFr2DXIYD83ddOrEnIRnst8_CAcSiRdpvrgqnht4H_Y2S3aYV5JtZ7TRVEDWhFXVVpG8UtiBeyQAZw==&c=1AbIww3J_sRL9nM07rIQainAjM_jZujFCgog4kcbjto_iVPIWH192g==&ch=cwl7OambJEaZJPNAcMFx9Enk9BaXrh5K8p6mMApdHV1IMFe-oZthow==)
As Jeff said, you can come after him with loud words and threats, but if anyone--let alone a member of the Press--thinks they can threaten his wife and family they've got another thing coming.
If they can do this to a sitting member of Congress, then they can do this to anyone.
[**Will you join us in standing up and condemn these despicable threats?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001thCyOlw-97cnHZTwVzJw5TvBC7OGRSRLH7tbOOblQE-xOxZIbX99yU-5KSFk-zpcvwLKdWSaD__taIIO3YMr60QAfM2ShYl_Dr4fk40zpib6G5XYnRIGvjVhf5VbqpuqWEUKdXM3Hfv-KkBq59laBJ11qg0vSLmlHKC5enIQcDWZIdJovGdj2kcOw4ZH9gX1G7DpxjSw13Zg2RTaUQTh00k-DOMZSKb82B8-TofAB8bfQpmI_aH7BmHdTQr5Ih-bA2hgjdnZSJapdwX4i6EDnJGTMw5XHi7WM4tr7IreCrErIbTy3HvdfaKVzxjrkSc6pQChhDgA1OQz7cFXjJ-9uI72cdWJXVac9X5J7pzqLFr2DXIYD83ddOrEnIRnst8_CAcSiRdpvrgqnht4H_Y2S3aYV5JtZ7TRVEDWhFXVVpG8UtiBeyQAZw==&c=1AbIww3J_sRL9nM07rIQainAjM_jZujFCgog4kcbjto_iVPIWH192g==&ch=cwl7OambJEaZJPNAcMFx9Enk9BaXrh5K8p6mMApdHV1IMFe-oZthow==)

Team Van Drew

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Make China Pay
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OC4Z2wVRFap6kLW1EXuTJ2pK-MweQVkxkPyUrR-t_e1e0H0tiHTZYScml9uyA4fCPEHVsO2iczoFdC3ProczRU5-QN2rKLO22ehGynOZxxfTCJJubbjS4SjPOEn2TNDQIwk-kOTvyeNNym8ZEKbbQ1LujL1ebzr3XhPSsmxhtbqZArcCrbjSiK2Aoj6I-83o&c=RnGDFktGLXelU9QmagR8fVAVN54Rdoa14uH7QrD6grOIDmf9TVIoWg==&ch=KRdJZV9olQCLqZJvVpBcdq8QQw7N9OfBvfKrrniv16bfrzGXNN2-_g==)
---
| Peter,
It's time for some tough talk with China. The coronavirus has wreaked havoc across our country, killing over 500,000 Americans and causing us to shut down nearly the entire economy.
We know China lied about multiple aspects of the coronavirus and used the World Health Organization to cover, yet now the Biden-Harris Administration has rejoined the WHO!
It's past time that we have a Congress that stands up to the Communist Party of China. For decades they have taken advantage of the United States. I say: enough is enough.
If you want to see America get tough on China, [I need you to chip in and show your support today](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OC4Z2wVRFap6kLW1EXuTJ2pK-MweQVkxkPyUrR-t_e1e0H0tiHTZYScml9uyA4fCPEHVsO2iczoFdC3ProczRU5-QN2rKLO22ehGynOZxxfTCJJubbjS4SjPOEn2TNDQIwk-kOTvyeNNym8ZEKbbQ1LujL1ebzr3XhPSsmxhtbqZArcCrbjSiK2Aoj6I-83o&c=RnGDFktGLXelU9QmagR8fVAVN54Rdoa14uH7QrD6grOIDmf9TVIoWg==&ch=KRdJZV9olQCLqZJvVpBcdq8QQw7N9OfBvfKrrniv16bfrzGXNN2-_g==). I am not afraid to take on China, and I want to see America lessen our dependence on them.
---
| | | [HOLD CHINA ACCOUNTABLE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OC4Z2wVRFap6kLW1EXuTJ2pK-MweQVkxkPyUrR-t_e1e0H0tiHTZYScml9uyA4fCPEHVsO2iczoFdC3ProczRU5-QN2rKLO22ehGynOZxxfTCJJubbjS4SjPOEn2TNDQIwk-kOTvyeNNym8ZEKbbQ1LujL1ebzr3XhPSsmxhtbqZArcCrbjSiK2Aoj6I-83o&c=RnGDFktGLXelU9QmagR8fVAVN54Rdoa14uH7QrD6grOIDmf9TVIoWg==&ch=KRdJZV9olQCLqZJvVpBcdq8QQw7N9OfBvfKrrniv16bfrzGXNN2-_g==)
---
| The truth is, too many people in Washington do not have the guts to stand up to the Communist Party of China. But I work for you, the American people, and I don't take my job lightly.
---
| | | [TELL CONGRESS TO STAND UP TO CHINA](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OC4Z2wVRFap6kLW1EXuTJ2pK-MweQVkxkPyUrR-t_e1e0H0tiHTZYScml9uyA4fCPEHVsO2iczoFdC3ProczRU5-QN2rKLO22ehGynOZxxfTCJJubbjS4SjPOEn2TNDQIwk-kOTvyeNNym8ZEKbbQ1LujL1ebzr3XhPSsmxhtbqZArcCrbjSiK2Aoj6I-83o&c=RnGDFktGLXelU9QmagR8fVAVN54Rdoa14uH7QrD6grOIDmf9TVIoWg==&ch=KRdJZV9olQCLqZJvVpBcdq8QQw7N9OfBvfKrrniv16bfrzGXNN2-_g==)
---
| Thanks for your support!
God bless America,
---

| Matt Gaetz

name: Judicial Watch Action
subject: Fitton on Fire at CPAC​: Biden Corruption, Saving Elections, Justice for Trump & Pelosi Cover Ups!
body:
Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton appeared at CPAC 2021 to discuss the Obamagate targeting of Donald Trump & other Americans, the Biden corruption allegations, & much more!
| | | ****
---
---
|
---
| **Fitton on Fire at CPAC: Biden Corruption, Saving Elections, Justice for Trump & Pelosi Cover Ups!

[](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53200&L=22284&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1mcXBuMWZ4b3RLayZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWFjdGlvbithbGVydCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMzE4MjEwMTA2)**
Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton appeared at CPAC 2021 to discuss the Obamagate targeting of Donald Trump & other Americans, the Biden corruption allegations, & much more! Read the full text of the speech below:

Judicial Watch is your watchdog in Washington – Hillary Clinton knows who we are, and President Trump knows who we are. I’m not sure what Joe Biden knows, but millions of patriots across the nation know and support our heavy lifting to expose and stop government corruption.
Judicial Watch is famous for using the Freedom of Information Act to figure out what the government is up to. No one has done more to uncover government corruption — from Benghazi to Clinton emails to Obamagate to the Biden family racketeering scandal. The rule of law protects the high and low. But the corrupt Deep State and its partisan allies subvert the rule of law. They aimed high by targeting President Trump with illicit spying and contemptible abuses of his civil rights.
President Trump is a crime victim. Who was behind the worst corruption scandal in American history? Obama, Biden, Comey, Brennan ... you know the rest. And when Trump raised questions about this conspiracy and Biden corruption the corrupt DC Establishment was so panicked that they tried and failed to remove him from office with their first sham impeachment. Remember the abuses of Trump are also about distraction — protecting Biden, Clinton, and other Swamp leaders from accountability for any misconduct and crimes. Let’s talk about the new president. No other president in recent American history has been so compromised by credible corruption allegations. There is significant evidence that directly implicates President “Big Guy” Biden in criminal activity tied to Hunter Biden’s rackets in Ukraine and China and other countries. Big Media and Big Tech, which seem to be nothing more than left wing advocacy groups, censored or covered this up for years, and the Justice Department and FBI, true to form, focused on protecting Biden while targeting Trump. When it comes to exposing and uncovering government corruption, the DOJ and FBI are part of the problem — and have done more to undermine the confidence of the American people in the rule of law than just about anyone. Those institutions were irredeemably compromised under the Obama administration and spent most of the Trump administration either trying to destroy Trump at the behest of the Clinton/Obama/Schiff cabal or trying to cover up the real corruption that it should have pursued but never did. The failure of the Justice Department to hold any significant person accountable for Obamagate crimes is a scandal. Gosh, Biden is giving promotions to some of his Obamagate co-conspirators! John Durham was appointed almost two years ago and there has been little evidence of a serious criminal investigation of those implicated in Spygate abuses of Trump and other innocent Americans, such as General Flynn. And the FBI and Justice Department had Hunter’s laptop for years but did nothing but protect the Biden clan. Why, for example, is there not yet a special counsel for Biden corruption? We had the corrupt appointment of Mueller to investigate non-crimes to harass President Trump but nothing yet for President Biden. I call on the Justice Department to immediately appoint a special counsel to investigate Biden corruption. And let me say this to Special Counsel Durham – reports are nice but prosecutions are better! Judicial Watch isn’t waiting on a Biden special counsel or a Durham report. Judicial Watch, not Congress nor the dishonest media, first uncovered that Hunter Biden [flew](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53200&L=19460&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvaHVudGVyLWJpZGVuLWZsaWdodHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249YWN0aW9uK2FsZXJ0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAzMTgyMTAxMDY=) to China at least five times while his father was vice president. A Judicial Watch federal lawsuit also uncovered that the Obama State Department noted the Russians were [trolling](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53200&L=20566&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvcnVzc2lhbnMtdHJvbGxpbmctam9lLWJpZGVuLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWFjdGlvbithbGVydCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMzE4MjEwMTA2) then-Vice President Biden’s “anti-corruption” activities in Ukraine because he was compromised by Hunter’s Burisma corruption. And then there is the Obamagate scandal. Much of what we know about this Obama/Biden scandal is a result of our unrelenting lawsuits and pressure. Heck, who needs an IG when you have Judicial Watch! And it was reconfirmed last year that targeting Trump was all about [protecting Hillary](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53200&L=16434&F=H&) over her emails! Even as Clinton cronies and enablers are in the Biden White House, we’re supposed to forget Clinton’s email crimes. Judicial Watch remembers. America remembers and still wants justice. By the way, it is now official. We can impeach former presidents and government officials. So, should we now impeach Obama, Hillary Clinton, Comey, Brennan, Susan Rice, and all the rest? And maybe we can have congressional impeachments! Schiff, Pelosi, Omar, and Swalwell! The Pelosi impeachments of President Trump are about election interference. The Left, with the help of their allies in Big Tech, want to be able to interfere with our elections and smear, jail and censor anyone who objects. The Left didn’t want to remove Trump because he incited violence. He didn’t and they don’t care about violence as they endorse and use it regularly. They wanted to abuse impeachment to undermine an effective leading opposition voice. The Left uses the pretext of COVID to rush through, sometimes contrary to law, long-sought changes in election rules that saw tens of millions of ballots and ballot applications being mailed to voter roll lists that are [notoriously inaccurate](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53200&L=21208&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdGFnL252cmEvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249YWN0aW9uK2FsZXJ0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAzMTgyMTAxMDY=). The tsunami of mail in ballots conveniently led to chaos in many key states on Election Day. By the way, [federal law](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53200&L=22295&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubGF3LmNvcm5lbGwuZWR1L3VzY29kZS90ZXh0LzIvNz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWFjdGlvbithbGVydCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMzE4MjEwMTA2) sets an Election Day, not an Election Week or an Election Month or an Election Winter. On Election Day, President Trump had the votes to win the presidency. These vote totals were changed because of unprecedented and extraordinary counting _after_ Election Day. Judicial Watch has long warned of the chaos and increased risk of fraud from recklessly mailing 100 million ballots and ballot applications. Our most recent research using data from just before the election, revealed that [353](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53200&L=20909&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvbmV3LWp3LXN0dWR5LXZvdGVyLXJlZ2lzdHJhdGlvbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1hY3Rpb24rYWxlcnQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDMxODIxMDEwNg==) U.S. counties had 1.8 million more registered voters than eligible voting-age citizens. In other words, the registration rates of those counties exceeded 100% of eligible voters. In Pennsylvania, our litigation to clean up dirty voting rolls uncovered [800,000](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53200&L=18726&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvanctc3Vlcy1wYS12b3RpbmcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249YWN0aW9uK2FsZXJ0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAzMTgyMTAxMDY=) “extra” names on the rolls. This maladministration of the elections, to put it charitably, undermined American’s confidence in the fairness of our elections and has significantly weakened Biden’s presidency. Let’s be clear. The Left ruined the election. How to fix this mess? Restore the rule of law on elections. One thing we aim to do is “get the receipts” about the 2020 election. Judicial Watch has 105 open record and Freedom of Information Act requests pending on the election. Another thing to do is clean up the rolls. Dirty voting rolls can mean dirty elections! A Judicial Watch federal lawsuit settlement is already resulting in [LA County](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53200&L=15011&F=H&) cleaning up to 1.5 million names from the rolls! And we’re in federal court now to clean up the rolls in [Pennsylvania](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53200&L=18726&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvanctc3Vlcy1wYS12b3RpbmcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249YWN0aW9uK2FsZXJ0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAzMTgyMTAxMDY=), [Colorado](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53200&L=20868&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvY28tdm90ZXItcm9sbHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249YWN0aW9uK2FsZXJ0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAzMTgyMTAxMDY=), and [North Carolina](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53200&L=18485&F=H&). And more lawsuits are coming, believe you me! And let me be clear, voting by mail should generally be ended. Vote by mail makes it nearly impossible to detect or even to pretend to prevent fraud. This security gap undermines confidence in the elections. Unless you’re putting your life on the line in Afghanistan or have some other emergency reason, the law should require you to vote in person — after your citizenship and eligibility has been verified and after you show your secure photo ID! And no ballot harvesting! Let me say this, if elections are not secure and are conducted in violation of the Constitution, many Americans will not vote in them. Secure elections conducted according to law will increase voter turnout! Can we have a debate on this? Not if Big Tech gets its way. Big Tech’s ban of President Trump for his blowing the whistle on the election is all about helping the Left. Neither [Section 230](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53200&L=22385&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubGF3LmNvcm5lbGwuZWR1L3VzY29kZS90ZXh0LzQ3LzIzMD91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWFjdGlvbithbGVydCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMzE4MjEwMTA2) nor any other law allows Big Tech to lie to the public and shareholders about their dishonest censorship of conservative Americans. This is basic business fraud that should be investigated by law enforcement. But at the saying goes: you can trust the Communists – to be Communists. Sure enough, Communist and leftist partisans now seek to effectively criminalize those who advocate for free, fair, and secure elections. Big Tech’s censorship of former President Trump and other conservative leading voices provides cover to the Left’s broad and governmental attack on the God-given rights of tens of millions of Americans. If you want an example of how the Left views your First Amendment rights — take a look at the miles-long, barbed wire fence around the U.S. Capitol. Don’t worry, Judicial Watch has Congress covered. We sued the Pelosi Congress for Capitol [riot emails and video](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53200&L=22137&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvanctc3Vlcy1jYXBpdG9sLXBvbGljZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1hY3Rpb24rYWxlcnQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDMxODIxMDEwNg==). We want to know what Pelosi and Schumer are hiding. Speaking of fences and walls, let’s talk about the border. Biden is seeking open-borders amnesty by hook or by crook, with zero regard for public health and safety — or rule of law. Biden would nationalize sanctuary policies that are not only illegal but deadly dangerous. He has launched the most significant attack on immigration law in American history. I could think of an article of impeachment or two for Biden’s outright refusal to enforce the law against illegal alien criminals and his policies that aid and abet human smuggling and child trafficking on the border! Biden is worse than Obama on lawless executive amnesty — and in just one month has caused a [humanitarian and public health disaster](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53200&L=22221&F=H&) on our Mexican border. What should be done? End sanctuary policies — both nationally and locally. Judicial Watch is in court in California and Maryland to challenge sanctuary policies that abuse taxpayers and harm the public safety. And just say no to amnesty! Even talking about amnesty increases illegal immigration! I think I’ve come up with a simple solution for the immigration crisis. President Trump knew this, too. Enforce the law! And, again, only citizens should vote. And we should change the laws to require you to prove your citizenship in order to register to vote. There is a way forward for conservatives. Here is the truth: The Biden administration is corrupt but weak. His party barely controls Congress. President Biden has a personal corruption problem, has obvious health challenges, must manage internal warfare between his party’s corrupt corporate wing and its rising Communists, and his moral claim on the presidency is rejected by a massive number of voters. But there are many loser Republicans who also have contempt for our concerns about Swamp corruption, election integrity, our borders, and accountable and constitutional government. So, it is Judicial Watch to the rescue. We know what to do. Sue them! Demand answers! Tell the truth! Protect citizens under the law! Defend the Constitution! Expose corrupt politicians of both political parties! As [George Washington](https://www.mountvernon.org/library/digitalhistory/quotes/article/truth-will-ultimately-prevail-where-pains-is-taken-to-bring-it-to-light/#:~:text=Letter%252520to%252520Charles%252520M.,1794%252520%2525C2%2525B7%252520George%252520Washington's%252520Mount%252520Vernon&text=%252522Truth%252520will%252520ultimately%252520prevail%252520where,to%252520bring%252520it%252520to%252520light.%252522) said, “Truth will ultimately prevail where pains is taken to bring it to light.” Again, Judicial Watch is your watchdog in Washington. We go to bat for you. We represent you. We defend you. We fight for you in court against those who would deny Americans their divine birthright — the rule of law.
God bless you and God bless America!
